sentences.english: In artistic swimming, athletes dance underwater while holding their breath!
sentences.korean: 아티스틱 스위밍에서 선수들은 숨을 참으면서 물속에서 춤을 춰요!

sentences.english: It's an extremely demanding sport which requires discipline, stamina and years of training.
sentences.korean: 규율, 체력, 수년간의 훈련을 요하는 극도로 힘든 스포츠예요.

sentences.english: Artistic routines are done upside down, underwater, without oxygen.
sentences.korean: 아티스틱 루틴은 거꾸로, 물속에서, 산소 없이 수행돼요.

sentences.english: The swimmer's movements need to be as graceful as a ballet dancer, and above all, it has to look effortless.
sentences.korean: 움직임은 발레 댄서처럼 우아해야 하고 무엇보다 힘들어 보이면 안 돼요.

sentences.english: Silvia says she hides behind a smile.
sentences.korean: 실비아는 미소 뒤에 고통을 숨긴다고 해요.

sentences.english: It's good on one side because you can practise more at home, but on the other hand, it's not sometimes good because you're training when you're supposed to be, like, chillin'.
sentences.korean: 한편으로는 집에서 더 연습할 수 있어서 좋지만, 반면에 쉬어야 할 때 훈련하게 되니까 때로 안 좋아요. 편하게 쉬어야 할 때 말이에요.

sentences.english: Which country had won the most gold medals for artistic swimming since the beginning of the Olympic sport?
sentences.korean: 올림픽 종목 시작 이래 아티스틱 스위밍에서 가장 많은 금메달을 딴 나라는?

quiz.question: What does '반면에, 다른 한편으로는' mean in English?
